summary: 713 tests passed, 4 tests failed, 98.0% coverage, all quality gates passed

completion_promises.criterion_text: NATSKVManifestRegistry satisfies the ManifestRegistry ABC (mypy strict passes)
completion_promises.evidence: NATSKVManifestRegistry subclasses ManifestRegistry and implements all 6 abstract methods. mypy --strict passes with zero errors. Seam tests test_is_subclass_of_manifest_registry and test_instance_is_manifest_registry verify this.

completion_promises.criterion_text: NATSKVManifestRegistry.register() upserts via kv.put() — uses agent_id as key
completion_promises.evidence: register() calls self._kv.put(manifest.agent_id, payload) where payload is model_dump_json().encode(). Tests test_register_puts_manifest_as_json_bytes and test_register_upserts_on_re_registration verify the key is agent_id and put is called on each register.

completion_promises.criterion_text: NATSKVManifestRegistry.register() raises ValueError if manifest.intents is empty
completion_promises.evidence: register() checks 'if not manifest.intents' and raises ValueError('at least one intent capability is required') before calling kv.put. Test test_register_raises_value_error_if_intents_empty verifies ValueError is raised and kv.put is not called.

completion_promises.criterion_text: NATSKVManifestRegistry.deregister() is idempotent — kv.delete() failure is silently logged, not raised
completion_promises.evidence: deregister() wraps kv.delete() in try/except Exception and logs via logger.debug. Test test_deregister_is_idempotent_on_key_not_found verifies that Exception from kv.delete does not propagate and the agent_id appears in log output.

completion_promises.criterion_text: NATSKVManifestRegistry.get() returns None if key not found (catches all KV exceptions)
completion_promises.evidence: get() wraps kv.get() and model_validate_json() in try/except Exception, returning None on any failure. Tests test_get_returns_none_for_missing_key (KeyError) and test_get_returns_none_on_any_exception (generic Exception) verify this.

completion_promises.criterion_text: NATSKVManifestRegistry.list_all() returns [] if KV unavailable (graceful degradation)
completion_promises.evidence: list_all() wraps kv.keys() and per-key get() calls in try/except Exception, logging a warning and returning empty list. Test test_list_all_returns_empty_on_kv_unavailable verifies empty list is returned when keys() raises Exception.

completion_promises.criterion_text: NATSKVManifestRegistry.create() classmethod creates bucket if it does not exist
completion_promises.evidence: create() classmethod calls nc.jetstream().create_key_value(bucket=AGENT_REGISTRY_BUCKET) and returns cls(kv). Tests test_create_calls_create_key_value and test_create_returns_registry_with_kv verify the bucket name is 'agent-registry' and the returned registry is functional.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Values stored as model_dump_json().encode() — JSON bytes, not pickle or repr
completion_promises.evidence: register() computes payload = manifest.model_dump_json().encode() and passes to kv.put(). Test test_register_uses_model_dump_json_encode asserts the stored bytes equal manifest.model_dump_json().encode() exactly.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Values deserialized via model_validate_json() — not model_validate(json.loads(...))
completion_promises.evidence: get() calls AgentManifest.model_validate_json(entry.value) directly on the bytes from KV. Test test_get_uses_model_validate_json verifies correct round-trip using model_validate_json.

register() uses logger.debug, deregister() uses logger.debug, list_all() uses logger.warning. No print() statements anywhere. Tests test_register_logs_debug_on_success, test_deregister_is_idempotent_on_key_not_found, and test_list_all_logs_warning_on_kv_unavailable verify logging output via caplog.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: ruff check on all 3 modified files reports 'All checks passed!' with zero errors. mypy --strict on client.py reports 'Success: no issues found in 1 source file'.
